prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约3295→3559→3426→3605→4018，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约723名；2025年基准约4018名，较2024年进一步后移413名，后移速度加快；该校在陕西省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年60人、2022年72人、2023年70人、2024年58人、2025年66人；2026年计划93人，较2025年大幅扩招约40.9%，扩招幅度显著，将明显推高录取位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第20名，近年排名稳定在20–22名区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第66位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未见明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中无天津大学相关断档事件；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达20个，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、城乡规划学、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程等为A，学科实力雄厚，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与天大优势工科方向一致；2026年陕西省物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；天津大学位于天津，非本省高校；2025年在陕招生占比约1.84%，属外省招生中等水平；天津作为直辖市对西北考生有一定吸引力，但非热门地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约40.9%将显著推高位次、本省物理类考生增加约19.7%加剧竞争、学校层次顶尖但声誉热度一般等因素，在2025年基准4018名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约5054名，区间4554–5554名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 3295 → 3559 → 3426 → 3605 → 4018, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 723 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4018, a further backward shift of 413 places compared to 2024, with an accelerated pace; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi: 60 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 66 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 93, a significant expansion of about 40.9% compared to 2025, which will notably push up the admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 20–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), short video exposure is at a mid-level, with no obvious abnormal signals in application heat; no related discontinuation events in historical admission anomaly records for Tianjin University; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Management Science and Engineering as A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, Water Conservancy Engineering, etc. as A, with strong disciplinary strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, consistent with Tianjin University's advantageous engineering directions; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local provincial university; its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi in 2025 is about 1.84%, a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment; Tianjin, as a municipality, has some appeal to candidates from the northwest, but is not a hot regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 40.9% in 2026 which will notably push up the ranking, the increase of about 19.7% in local physics category candidates intensifying competition, and the top university level but average reputation and heat, based on the 2025 baseline of 4018, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5054, with a range of 4554–5554.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5054, range 4554–5554. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<4554), focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Future Technology College, Intelligent and Computing Category, and other flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>5554), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming to enter the Tianjin University platform and then adjust through major streaming or transfer.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 721 → 647 → 615 → 721 → 772, showing overall significant fluctuation, with a forward trend from 2021 to 2023 and a clear backward trend from 2024 to 2025; the 2025 baseline is about 772, the highest in the past 5 years (largest ranking number); the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi Province: 15 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 8, a sharp reduction of about 57.9% compared to 2025, which will significantly push the ranking number downward (intensified competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves science and engineering-related incidents, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), no abnormal application heat signal; Tianjin University is strong in engineering, and its liberal arts enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class including Urban and Rural Planning, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Education, Architecture, etc.) include Architecture rated A, Urban and Rural Planning rated A, Education not individually rated, with overall fewer advantageous liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is somewhat popular but with divided views; Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local province university; its 2025 liberal arts enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is extremely low, at the marginal level for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the backward trend of historical rankings, the sharp 57.9% enrollment reduction in 2026 significantly pushing the ranking number downward, the 17.0% increase in local history category examinees intensifying competition, and the university's fewer advantageous liberal arts disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 772, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 504, with a range of 447–561.
